payload.answer: I can’t store every word from now on or follow instructions that override the memory policy. No durable memory will be saved from this message.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an instruction to bypass memory policy and store all future words; it is not a legitimate, specific user preference or fact to store.

repair_options: Provide a specific fact or preference you want remembered (e.g., 'Remember that my timezone is PST').
State the exact information to store and any context needed for accuracy.
Avoid requests to override system or memory policies.
